props.stylesheet:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml"/>
<xsl:template match="/Row">
<env:Envelope xmlns:env="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:wd="urn:com.workday/bsvc"><env:Body>
<wd:Submit_Payroll_Input_Request wd:version="v42.0">
  <wd:Payroll_Input_Data>
    <wd:Worker_Reference><wd:ID wd:type="Employee_ID"><xsl:value-of select="Employee_ID"/></wd:ID></wd:Worker_Reference>
    <wd:Pay_Component><xsl:value-of select="Pay_Component"/></wd:Pay_Component>
    <wd:Amount><xsl:value-of select="Amount"/></wd:Amount>
  </wd:Payroll_Input_Data>
</wd:Submit_Payroll_Input_Request>
</env:Body></env:Envelope>
</xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>

props.message: Inbound payroll load complete for period @{props.pay_period}
